name: wwdcbuddy
title: WWDCBuddy
description: Browse and update your WWDCBuddy events, friends, and relations using the wwdcbuddy CLI.
author: harryworld

commands.name: search-friends
commands.title: Search Friends
commands.subtitle: WWDCBuddy
commands.description: Browse, search, and edit WWDCBuddy friends.

commands.name: browse-relations
commands.title: Browse Relations
commands.subtitle: WWDCBuddy
commands.description: Browse event attendees and wishlist relations.

preferences.name: cliPath
preferences.title: wwdcbuddy CLI Path
preferences.description: Path to the wwdcbuddy binary. Leave as 'wwdcbuddy' to auto-resolve from common install locations.

preferences.name: databasePath
preferences.title: Database Path
preferences.description: Optional override for the EventBuddy SQLite database path. Leave empty to use the default app-group database.
